name: Rasout
subtitle: Pamaltelan Hunter God

requirements.initiate: to have 5 cult skills at 50%+ one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity, Examiners need to be convinced at 3 of them.Must hunt and kill at least one prey beast per season to donate to their poeple. They must always use the peaceful cut on any animal killed for food
